personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Platform Engineer | Lakehouse, AI Data Platforms, Python/SQL/Spark

summary: Senior Data Platform Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and deep financial-services delivery background. Strong hands-on experience building production Python, SQL, PySpark/Spark, and ETL/ELT pipelines for telemetry, forecasting, reporting, and data platform use cases. Experienced in data quality, reconciliation, schema design, historical data modeling, performance optimization, operational monitoring, and stakeholder-facing delivery in regulated banking environments. Currently extending AWS/PySpark experience into modern lakehouse patterns including Parquet, Delta Lake, Apache Iceberg concepts, Databricks concepts, and AI data platform enablement.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and operated Python/Pandas and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines ingesting P95 infrastructure telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual data preparation with repeatable production data flows.

Built governed reporting and forecasting datasets for financial-services infrastructure teams, applying SQL, schema design, data validation, reconciliation, and historical retention patterns to support operational decision-making.
Designed optimized Oracle and Redshift-backed data structures for capacity forecasting workloads, improving query reliability and enabling parallel analysis of large historical telemetry volumes.
Developed ML forecasting pipelines using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks months ahead, connecting curated data assets to analytics and AI/ML use cases.
Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting pipelines with clear controls for completeness, accuracy, and operational break investigation.
Built AWS-based data platform components using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and cloud-oriented pipeline design to modernize on-premise data processing patterns.

Created dashboards and stakeholder-ready reporting using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, and SQL-backed datasets, translating technical pipeline outputs into executive capacity and risk insights.
Supported production issue analysis, root-cause investigation, and workflow improvements across data pipelines, monitoring feeds, and reporting outputs in a regulated banking environment.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical hospitality systems and converted real-user and synthetic performance telemetry into actionable analytics for engineering teams.
Led the FAST project, data-mining user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-critical digital systems.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile systems, improving visibility into operational data flows and service behavior.
Partnered with engineering teams during AWS migration planning, providing observability, performance, and operational-readiness analysis for cloud transition decisions.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting enterprise-scale telemetry and platform reliability.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and management modules used to standardize monitoring and issue-resolution workflows across client environments.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate weekly performance reporting, replacing manual exports with repeatable data processing routines.
Collaborated with J2EE, WebLogic, database, and operations teams to troubleshoot bottlenecks, analyze telemetry, and document root-cause findings for production systems.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction correctness and sub-second query behavior.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing routines to verify migration accuracy across high-volume transactional datasets.
Optimized database access patterns and transaction processing logic, reducing hardware footprint while maintaining performance for mission-critical workloads.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark-oriented forecasting platform for banking-scale telemetry, turning raw infrastructure data into curated forecasting datasets and decision-support dashboards.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and Bedrock to support analytics and AI data access use cases.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic data workflow using Python, semantic duplicate detection, vector embeddings, LLM scoring, JSON quality gates, and automated artifact generation.
